# GroundTruther – Python dependencies
#
# DO NOT install these with any system Python.
# Use setup_windows.ps1 (Windows) or setup_wsl.sh (Linux/WSL2) which
# target the correct Python interpreter for your QGIS installation.
#
# osgeo / gdal / PyQt5 / qgis are intentionally absent – they ship
# with QGIS and must NOT be installed via pip.

# ---- Core data handling ----
numpy
pandas
pyarrow

# ---- Image I/O and computer vision ----
scikit-image
scipy

# ---- Plotting / visualisation ----
pyqtgraph
PyOpenGL
matplotlib
plotnine

# ---- Geospatial ----
pyproj
simplekml
requests

# ---- Config & templating ----
PyYAML
# pydantic v1 API (error_wrappers) – pin below v2
pydantic>=1.9,<2
starlette
Jinja2

# ---- Optional: JIT acceleration (requires LLVM toolchain on Windows) ----
# numba
